commit.message:
fix: route protection, admin redirect, plan prices, portfolio upload errors

- middleware: redirect ADMIN from /dashboard → /admin/dashboard after login
- dashboard: fetch /api/dashboard/stats checks r.ok before setStats (prevents crash on 401)
- ErrorBoundary: "Retour" button → / instead of /dashboard (avoids crash loop)
- seed: fix plan prices Standard 500000→5000 FCFA, Pro 1000000→10000 FCFA
- DB: UPDATE subscription_plans prices to correct values (5000/10000/20000)
- storage: throw STORAGE_NOT_CONFIGURED in production without R2 instead of crashing
- portfolio API: return 503 with clear message when R2 not configured
- portfolio UI: display helpful message for STORAGE_NOT_CONFIGURED error

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add verified prediction market trading platform

Four AI agents scan prediction markets, commit predictions on-chain
via Chainlink CRE, and get scored by an independent oracle via
Chainlink Functions. Contracts deployed on Ethereum Sepolia and
verified on Tenderly Virtual TestNet.

- SignalRegistry + AccuracyLedger with real Chainlink DON scoring
- SeptonsVault with Chainlink ETH/USD Price Feed
- Market Scout, Autonomous Trader, Portfolio Manager, Intelligence Advisor
- Next.js dashboard with RainbowKit wallet connect
- CRE signal recorder workflow
- Deploy scripts for Sepolia and Tenderly

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix: Allow drawing lines from purple endpoint dots

Bug: Drawing could not start from purple endpoint dots (regression from e95f200)
Root cause: The condition `strokeMid || endpoint` blocked ALL endpoints,
when it should only block stroke middles that aren't at endpoints.

Fix: Changed to `strokeMid && !endpoint` in both mousedown and touchstart.
- Stroke middle (no endpoint): blocked, mouseup will select
- Endpoint (purple dot): allowed, can draw lines from here

Added tests:
- tests/interaction.test.js: Unit tests for drawing decision logic
- tests/e2e/drawing.test.js: E2E tests documenting all interaction scenarios

These tests prevent future regressions by testing the invariant:
"Purple endpoints are always valid drawing start points"

commit.message:
Fix MAGScoT: symlink profiles/ into bin/ for R script discovery

MAGScoT.R uses funr::sys.script() to find its own path, then
looks for profiles/ relative to that. Since MAGScoT.R is symlinked
from bin/ to share/MAGScoT/, the profiles dir needs to be accessible
from bin/ too.

commit.message:
fix: stabilize flaky TestSyncClientImpl_InternalKeys (#939)

## Summary
- Fix flaky `TestSyncClientImpl_InternalKeys` that failed intermittently
on CI
- The test used `assert.NotEmpty` with `assert.Eventually` to check for
remaining RangeScan results after consuming 4 items with
`ShowInternalKeys(true)`
- Root cause: system-created internal keys (`__oxia/commit-offset`,
`__oxia/term`, etc.) arrive asynchronously via a buffered channel,
making `assert.NotEmpty` timing-dependent
- Fix: drain remaining system-internal keys deterministically with `for
range resCh`

Closes #936

## Test plan
- [x] 20/20 pass locally with `-race -count=20`

---------

Signed-off-by: mattisonchao <mattisonchao@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: Memory versioning — full audit trail for every mutation

Every memory mutation is now tracked in memory_versions table:
- Version 0 recorded on creation (in queries.store_memory)
- Dedup UPDATE/SUPERSEDE snapshots pre-mutation state
- Manual update/delete via MCP tools records before-state
- Scheduler consolidation records both winner and loser
- Auto-summarize records version before summary change

New MCP tools: memory_history (audit trail), memory_restore (revert)
New API endpoints: GET /api/memories/{id}/history, POST /api/memories/{id}/restore
restore_memory_version re-embeds content and records a 'restore' version

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix gap analysis scripts to report accurate operation counts

generate_parity_report.py: Complete _SERVICE_DIR_MAP (was missing
es→opensearch, sesv2→ses, resource-groups, tagging), rewrite
get_moto_operations() to validate candidates against botocore ops
(was picking up class properties and URL slugs as operations), and
always check Moto ops for all services (not just moto_backed).

analyze_localstack.py: Rewrite analyze_robotocore_gap() to use
build_report() from generate_parity_report instead of ad-hoc provider
scanning, ensuring both Gap 1 and Gap 2 use the same detection logic.

Also fix lint errors in validate_app_tests*.py scripts.

Result: Gap 1 drops from 90/816 to 38/465 missing ops. No more false
0% services (es, resource-groups, tagging, sesv2, polly all now correct).

Feature: Auto-create incident reports for observations and contested ballots

Three changes:

1. Fix function call parsing: check all response parts, not just parts[0]
2. Detect code-as-text function calls and retry with forced tool use
3. Add 'osservazioni' field to save_scrutinio_data tool — when the bot
   parses an electoral form with observations/contestations text, it now
   automatically creates an IncidentReport. Also triggers for
   schede_contestate > 0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: modernize Go codebase for Go 1.25 (#473)

Modernize the codebase to use idiomatic Go 1.25 patterns, removing deprecated APIs and reducing external dependencies.

- Replace deprecated `io/ioutil` with `os.ReadFile`, `os.WriteFile`, `os.MkdirTemp`, `os.CreateTemp`
- Replace `interface{}` with `any` (Go 1.18+)
- Remove `github.com/pkg/errors` dependency entirely, using stdlib `fmt.Errorf` with `%w` and `errors.New`
- Use `errors.As()` instead of direct type assertions on error values
- Use `strings.Cut()` for delimiter parsing instead of `strings.Split` + length check
- Use `slices.Contains()` for linear search in `ContextExists()`
- Use `t.Setenv()` and `t.TempDir()` in tests instead of manual env save/restore and temp dir cleanup
- Delete unused `internal/testutil/tempfile.go` helper
- Update GitHub Actions CI and release workflows from Go 1.22 to 1.25

Net result: -70 lines, 1 fewer external dependency.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix tooltip/cell mismatch in median mode: display values now consistent

In median mode, YearTable cell displayed MC median values (displayX)
but CellTooltip showed deterministic ending balances (row.X), causing
the tooltip ending balance to differ from the cell value.

  instead of the deterministic net-change label

  in median mode across all 4 accounts
- Added unit tests for median-mode display consistency

commit.message:
refactor: Reader deterministic chunking with stage-level cache (#95)

- Add docChunker.ts: splits documents on section boundaries (double
  newline + capital letter), falls back to single newline, then hard
  character-boundary splits.  Max 2000 estimated tokens per chunk.

- Add stageCache.ts: SHA-256 document hashing + Supabase artifacts
  table cache (fail-open if cache_key column missing).

- Modify orchestrator.ts Reader stage:
  - Check cache before LLM calls; return cached result on hit
  - Split document into chunks when > 1 chunk produced
  - Execute Reader LLM per chunk with 300ms inter-call delay
  - Merge results: deduplicate screens by screen_id, rules/items by
    normalized text, keep first platform_context
  - Cache merged result after successful execution
  - Preserve single-call path for image-based inputs and small docs

A2–A6 stages are intentionally untouched.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix messages sending too fast while Lovable is still processing

- Add 30s grace period after sending — no completion checks during this window
- Increase MIN_AI_WORK_TIME from 10s to 30s (agent prompts need more time)
- Increase STUCK_FALLBACK_TIME from 15s to 180s (3 min safety net)
- Add streaming/thinking indicator detection (class-based)
- Add safety guard in sendNextMessage() to enforce grace period
- Use isAIWorking() in completion check (not just button state)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: comprehensive pipeline optimization — 10 issues fixed

1. enrichment-runner PipelineLogger leak: add plog.error() on 2 early returns
2. dYdX enrichment: remove incorrect fetchGmxPositionHistory reference
3. freshness thresholds: add 11 missing platforms (drift, bitunix, btcc, etc.)
4. health-monitor: sync DEAD_PLATFORMS with canonical list (+kwenta, synthetix)
5. cron stagger: spread heavy jobs to avoid triple collisions at :50
6. split Group D (4→D1+D2) and Group G (4→G1+G2) to stay under 300s limit
7. exchange-configs: wrap module-level loop in try-catch
8. backfill-avatars: replace dead weex/phemex with drift/btcc
9. freshness API auth: fix bypass when env vars unset (!validSecret)
10. batch-enrich: remove dead platforms from PLATFORM_LIMITS and MEDIUM_PRIORITY

Also: filter DEAD_BLOCKED_PLATFORMS in health/detailed and verify-registry

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
